name: C Cubed Casserole (Corn, Cheese, & Chilis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the corn in small batches in a food processor, not too much; you want chunks.
2. Shred the cheese and mix with the corn.
3. Dump the can of chili into the mixture.
4. (Optional) Clean any options: core and seed peppers, remove skin of garlic.
- Chop the garlic and finely chop the peppers in a food processor.
- Slice the onion and fry the garlic, fresh peppers, and onion in a pan with a little oil for a few minutes.
- Add these to the mix.
4. Mix everything well and put into Corningware.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
